RULING:
PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING PREFERENCE IN SETTING CASE FOR TRIAL MAINTAINING THE CURRENT TRIAL DATE

Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiffs' motion for order granting preference in setting case for trial, maintaining the current trial date is denied without prejudice. Plaintiffs failed to demonstrate that the interests of justice will be served by granting preference, as required by C.C.P. 36(e). Oppositions filed by Certaineed Corp. and DAP, Inc. were not considered for failure to lodge courtesy copies with the Court. (S.F. Local Rules 2.7(B), 2.11(T).) Order signed in open court.
